videos.title: HTML Elements Explained - Full Guide
videos.description: A comprehensive overview of HTML elements, covering block vs inline, semantic elements, and best practices.

videos.title: HTML Crash Course - Elements & Tags
videos.description: Brad Traversy covers all major HTML elements including headings, paragraphs, lists, tables, forms, and semantic elements.

videos.title: Semantic HTML: What, Why, and How
videos.description: Kevin Powell explains why semantic HTML is important and how to use semantic elements correctly.

videos.title: HTML Elements - Beginner to Advanced
videos.description: Learn about HTML elements from basic to advanced, including content categories and proper nesting.

videos.title: HTML Forms and Input Elements Tutorial
videos.description: A complete guide to HTML form elements, input types, and form validation techniques.
